command:
echo '=== EXPOSE POSTGRES 5432 ON LOCALHOST ===' && cd /opt/n8n && cp docker-compose.yml docker-compose.yml.bak.mcp && python3 -c "
import yaml
with open('docker-compose.yml') as f:
    d = yaml.safe_load(f)
if 'postgres' in d.get('services', {}):
    svc = d['services']['postgres']
    ports = svc.get('ports', [])
    if '127.0.0.1:5432:5432' not in [str(p) for p in ports]:
        ports.append('127.0.0.1:5432:5432')
        svc['ports'] = ports
        with open('docker-compose.yml', 'w') as f:
            yaml.dump(d, f, default_flow_style=False, allow_unicode=True)
        print('Added 127.0.0.1:5432:5432')
    else:
        print('Already exposed')
else:
    print('No postgres service found')
" 2>&1 && echo '' && echo '=== RESTART POSTGRES ===' && cd /opt/n8n && docker compose up -d postgres 2>&1 && sleep 3 && echo '' && echo '=== VERIFY ===' && ss -tlnp | grep 5432 && echo '' && echo '=== TEST CONNECTION ===' && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d n8n -c '\dt' 2>&1 | head -20
intent: Expose PostgreSQL port 5432 on localhost for MCP access
